name: soho
description: A layered agent engineering system that combines rigorous methodology with explicit swarm orchestration.

interface.shortDescription: Methodology plus orchestration for coding agents
interface.longDescription: Use Soho to combine design-first planning, TDD, systematic verification, role-based delegation, topology selection, and synthesis with honest runtime receipts.
defaultPrompt: Use Soho to plan and build this feature.
Use Soho swarm mode to decompose and verify this task.
